name: Cheesy Chili for a Crowd
recipeIngredient: 15 Ounces kidney beans, rinsed and drained
16 Ounces CHEEZ WHIZ, pasteurized process cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown meat with onion in a 4-quart Dutch oven or saucepot on medium-high heat; drain.
2. Reduce heat to medium-low.
3. Stir in tomatoes, beans, tomato paste, water, chili powder, and cumin; cover.
4. Simmer for 10 minutes or until thoroughly heated.
5. Stir in process cheese sauce until melted. Spoon over pasta.
